- [ ] Self-reviewed

## For Main PRs
- If the target branch is `main`, use a Conventional Commits PR title.
- `main` keeps a linear history. Prepare the branch for `Rebase and merge`.
- Example: `feat(reporting): add monthly reporting filters`
